title: AI's BIGGEST Problem: The Adoption Gap Explained! #shorts
summary: The adoption gap in AI is identified as a major problem where cutting-edge systems like agentic AI and LLMs advance rapidly but businesses struggle to integrate them. The gap is widening, leaving many companies behind in deployment.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof frames the adoption gap as a central problem in AI: capabilities in agentic and multi-agent systems and LLMs advance quickly, while businesses lag in integrating them. The takeaway is that the gap is widening, leaving many companies behind on deployment even as the underlying technology improves.
